description: Style Notewoodland, a giant in the outdoor shoe industry, have come up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. Stylish overlays on the Nubuk upper adds an aesthetic styling. Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. Wear this with chinos or denims, a checked casual shirt or a tee and style it with a rugged belt. Product DetailsRound toed brown and olive coloured casual shoes with lace up fastening which has D ring eyelets Nubuk upper with strategic leather overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel collar, pull loop at the heel collar, foxing at the toe box Slightly padded mouth and tongue, mesh lining and a soft footbed Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with multi directional lugs, outsole extends in front to form a toe guard and at the heel collar to form a heel guardMaterial and CareNubuk, TPU, LeatherUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Use a leather conditioner to protect the leatherDo not store in direct sunlight
